assertions.expectation: Recommends Stable or Extended release channel to minimize upgrade frequency
assertions.reason: Recommends Regular channel instead of Stable or Extended channel, which provides less stability

assertions.expectation: Recommends 'no minor or node upgrades' maintenance exclusion to block disruptive upgrades while allowing security patches on the control plane
assertions.reason: Explicitly shows using --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope no_minor_or_node_upgrades to protect training periods while allowing control plane security patches

assertions.expectation: Recommends a narrow maintenance window (e.g., weekends only) so CP patches happen at predictable times
assertions.reason: Configures Saturday 6-10 AM UTC maintenance window and explains the timing choice

assertions.expectation: Suggests isolating training workloads on dedicated GPU node pools separate from serving/infrastructure pools
assertions.reason: Shows clear segregation with separate training-h100 node pool for GPU workloads and infrastructure node pool, including node taints and labels

assertions.expectation: Recommends disabling auto-upgrade on GPU training node pools and upgrading manually during scheduled gaps between training runs
assertions.reason: Explicitly uses --no-enable-autoupgrade for training node pool and provides detailed manual upgrade procedure for planned gaps

assertions.expectation: Advises configuring training frameworks with checkpointing so jobs can resume after any disruption
assertions.reason: Includes checkpointing configuration example with CHECKPOINT_INTERVAL and RESUME_FROM_CHECKPOINT environment variables

assertions.expectation: Mentions GPU driver version testing — always validate in staging before applying to production GPU pools
assertions.reason: States 'Always test target GKE version in staging first' and mentions H100 driver compatibility requirements

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPUDirect/RDMA networking has strict GKE version requirements — verify compatibility before upgrading
assertions.reason: While mentions high-MTU VPC for RDMA/GPUDirect, does not specifically warn about strict GKE version requirements for this networking or need to verify compatibility before upgrading
